# AI PM Leveling Matrix (L4 to Principal)

| Level | Scope | Decision quality signal | Evidence expectation |
|---|---|---|---|
| L4 | Feature-level execution | Delivers scoped AI features with guardrails | PRD + eval + launch checklist |
| L5 | Cross-feature ownership | Drives trade-offs across teams and constraints | Multi-feature decision logs + metric trends |
| L6 | Product-area leadership | Sets operating standards and risk posture | Governance artifacts + incident learnings |
| Principal / Staff | Org-level influence | Shapes portfolio, platform policy, and capability model | Portfolio outcomes + organizational control systems |

## Self-assessment prompts
- Which level do your current artifacts support?
- What evidence is missing for the next level?
- Which recurring decisions are you trusted to own?
